hero.titlePart2: , with the agent you already trust.
hero.subtitle: Dossiat is a decentralized platform where independent Agents handle your administrative, financial, and errand-based missions — billable, traceable, and geo-independent.

features.title: A workflow layer, not a gatekeeper.
features.subtitle: Dossiat is intentionally hands-off. We provide the rails for traceability, quoting, and communication — Agents and clients own the relationship and the liability.
features.quotingDesc: Set a fixed fee or log time and tasks for dynamic billing. You price your work — we don't.
features.recurrentDesc: Schedule daily, weekly, monthly or annual tasks. Dossiat auto-generates the next mission and notifies both sides.
features.agreementDesc: Before any work begins, both parties tick a simple checklist that acts as a mutual digital agreement.
features.paymentsDesc: Cash, bank transfer, Stripe, PayPal — whatever suits the mission. Funds go directly to the Agent. We never hold them.
features.feeDesc3: . On online payments, the fee is calculated only on the net amount after gateway fees.
features.mediationDesc: If something goes sideways, our Reconciliation Room helps both parties find an amicable, out-of-court solution.

workflow.title: From invite to invoice, in four moves.
workflow.subtitle: No public marketplace noise. Clients are introduced by Agents they already know — or by the Agents they find through them.
workflow.step1Desc: The Agent shares their unique Dossiat link via WhatsApp, email, or social. The client lands on a limited preview of the Agent's profile.
workflow.step2Desc: After registration, the full Agent profile unlocks. Both sides tick the checkbox agreement to formalize scope and confidentiality.
workflow.step3Desc: The Agent updates statuses, uploads proof (docs, photos), and exchanges async messages with the client. Every step is timestamped.
workflow.step4Desc: Pay cash, by transfer, or via Stripe / PayPal. Both click "Sent" and "Received". The platform fee is auto-deducted from the Agent's credit balance.

agents.subtitle: Dossiat gives independent professionals a complete toolkit to invite clients, price their work transparently, and run recurring missions — without the platform ever touching the money.
agents.feature1Desc: Legal, Finance, Real Estate, Admin — pick your specialties and the client types (B2B, B2C) you accept.
agents.feature2Desc: One branded URL. Share it anywhere. Each click is attributable and leads to a curated onboarding.
agents.feature3Desc: Top up once, deduct automatically. Or settle monthly — whichever matches your cash flow.

pricing.title: Built for companies that ship missions.
pricing.subtitle: Three tiers for the size of your team. Cancel any time. All plans include the full mission workflow.
pricing.currencyNote: All prices in USD. Multi-currency support available on every plan.

faq.title: Everything you'd ask before signing up.
faq.subtitle: Still curious? Our team replies to every message within one business day.
faq.q1: Is Dossiat an employer, bank, or legal representative?
faq.a1: No. Dossiat is a software provider — full stop. Our Terms of Service explicitly state that we are not an employer, financial institution, or legal representative. All liability sits with the Agents and their clients. We provide the workflow, traceability, and communication tools; nothing more.
faq.q2: How does the platform get paid on cash missions?
faq.a2: Agents maintain a Platform Credit Balance. For a $100 cash mission with a 1% fee, we deduct $2 from that balance. Agents can top up credits anytime, or settle via a monthly consolidated invoice — whichever matches their cash flow.
faq.q3: What happens if a dispute arises?
faq.a3: The mission enters "Reconciliation Mode" — a structured chat room where both parties state their case and propose a solution. The goal is peer-to-peer, out-of-court resolution. We provide the audit trail, but we do not arbitrate, judge, or absorb liability. Professional and Enterprise plans get priority access to mediation.
faq.a4: USD, EUR, GBP, MAD, AED, SAR, CAD, AUD, JPY, CHF, and 30+ more. Each Agent selects their operating currency; the platform fee (1% with a $1 minimum) is calculated dynamically in that currency.
faq.q5: Can my company connect Dossiat to our ERP?
faq.a5: Yes — on the Enterprise tier. You get a dedicated REST API and webhook system to create missions, fetch expense data, and push reconciliation events directly into your internal tools.

cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of Agents and B2B teams who use Dossiat to coordinate, bill, and resolve work across borders.

footer.tagline: A decentralized mission network for Agents and the clients who trust them. Software layer only — never a bank, never an employer.
